title: Ison (star)

'''Ison''' was the [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] [[Star/Legends|primary]] of the [[Ison system/Legends|Ison system]]. It was surrounded by a [[Asteroid field|rubble field]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Star-stub}}
